name: 10ft Standard Container
description: Compact 10ft ISO shipping container built to the 668 standard, ideal for tight urban sites, small on-site storage, or as a starter unit for container conversion projects. Weatherproof steel construction with a full-width cargo door.

name: 20ft Standard Container
description: The workhorse of the shipping industry: a 20ft ISO standard container offering roughly 33 cubic metres of weatherproof, lockable storage. Popular for site storage, export shipping, and as the base module for container conversions.

name: 20ft High Cube Container
description: A 20ft container with an extra foot of internal height over the standard unit, giving more headroom for bulky cargo, racking, or conversion projects that need extra vertical clearance.

name: 40ft Standard Container
description: The most widely used container size worldwide, offering around 67 cubic metres of secure storage or cargo capacity. A cost-efficient choice for long-term site storage, warehousing overflow, or shipping.

name: 40ft High Cube Container
description: A 40ft container with a taller 2.9m internal height, giving extra volume for bulky goods, mezzanine conversions, or applications where standard-height containers fall short.

name: 45ft High Cube Container
description: The largest common ISO box, combining maximum length with high-cube height for the greatest single-unit capacity in our container range, suited to high-volume storage or large-scale conversion projects.

name: 20ft Open Top Container
description: A 20ft container with a removable tarpaulin/bow roof instead of a fixed steel top, allowing top-loading of oversized or awkward cargo that won't fit through the door.

name: 40ft Open Top Container
description: 40ft length with a removable soft-top roof for crane or forklift loading from above, suited to machinery, timber, or other cargo too tall or bulky for standard end-loading.

name: 20ft Hardtop Container
description: A 20ft container with a removable solid steel roof, combining the security of a standard box with the top-loading flexibility of an open-top unit.

name: 40ft Hardtop Container
description: 40ft version of our hardtop range: a removable steel roof allows overhead loading while keeping the full weatherproofing and security of a closed container.

name: 20ft Flat Rack Container
description: An open-sided, open-topped 20ft platform with fixed or collapsible end walls, built for shipping oversized, heavy, or irregularly shaped cargo that won't fit inside a box container.

name: 40ft Flat Rack Container (High Cube)
description: Our largest flat rack: a 40ft high-cube platform rated for heavy, oversized loads such as machinery, vehicles, or structural steel that need side or top loading.

name: 20ft Refrigerated Container (Reefer)
description: A 20ft insulated reefer unit with an integrated cooling system, built to maintain controlled temperatures for perishable goods in storage or transit.

name: 40ft High Cube Refrigerated Container (Reefer)
description: A 40ft high-cube reefer offering maximum refrigerated capacity in our range, suited to large-scale cold storage or temperature-controlled freight.

name: 6ft Storage Box
description: CONTAINEX's smallest storage box: a compact, lockable steel unit for garden, trade, or site storage where space is at a premium.

name: 8ft Storage Box
description: An 8ft CONTAINEX storage box offering a step up in capacity from the 6ft unit, still small enough for tight residential or trade sites.

name: 9ft Storage Box
description: CONTAINEX's 9ft storage box, a mid-size lockable steel unit for tools, stock, or equipment that need secure, weatherproof storage on site.

name: 10ft Storage Box
description: A 10ft CONTAINEX storage box, one of the most popular sizes for site tool storage, small business stock, or seasonal household overflow.

name: 15ft Storage Box
description: CONTAINEX's 15ft storage box bridges the gap between compact and full-size units, giving extra capacity without the footprint of a full 20ft container.

name: 20ft Storage Box
description: A full 20ft CONTAINEX storage box, purpose-built (rather than a converted shipping container) for site or commercial storage with the manufacturer's own steel security profile.

name: 10ft Office Cabin (CLASSIC Line)
description: CONTAINEX's 10ft CLASSIC-line office cabin, a compact, insulated site office ready to drop onto any level surface, suited to small teams or single-occupant use.

name: 16ft Office Cabin (CLASSIC Line)
description: A 16ft CLASSIC-line office cabin from CONTAINEX, giving extra floor space over the 10ft unit for small teams, meeting space, or a combined office/storage layout.

name: 20ft Office Cabin (CLASSIC Line)
description: CONTAINEX's 20ft CLASSIC-line office cabin, a full-size insulated site office suited to small-to-medium teams, with room for desks, storage, and a meeting area.

name: 24ft Office Cabin (CLASSIC Line)
description: The largest standard-width CLASSIC-line office cabin, giving maximum single-unit floor space for larger site teams or multi-function office layouts.

name: 20ft Office Cabin (BASIC Line)
description: CONTAINEX's 20ft BASIC-line office cabin, a no-frills, cost-effective alternative to the CLASSIC line for straightforward site office needs.

name: 10ft Office Cabin (PLUS Line)
description: A 10ft PLUS-line office cabin from CONTAINEX, built on a taller 3.1m frame than the CLASSIC line for extra headroom in a compact footprint.

name: 16ft Office Cabin (PLUS Line)
description: CONTAINEX's 16ft PLUS-line cabin combines the taller PLUS-line frame with mid-size floor space for a more spacious site office.

name: 20ft Office Cabin (PLUS Line)
description: A 20ft PLUS-line office cabin, CONTAINEX's taller-frame option at full 20ft length, suited to teams that want extra headroom and floor space.

name: 24ft Office Cabin (PLUS Line)
description: The largest PLUS-line office cabin in our range, pairing maximum floor space with the taller PLUS-line frame for a premium site office.

name: 20ft XL Wide-Body Office Cabin
description: CONTAINEX's 20ft XL wide-body office cabin, nearly 3m wide, giving noticeably more usable floor space than the standard-width CLASSIC or PLUS lines.

name: 10ft Sanitary / WC Cabin
description: A 10ft CONTAINEX sanitary/WC cabin, fitted out for site welfare facilities in a compact footprint.

name: 16ft Sanitary / WC Cabin
description: CONTAINEX's 16ft sanitary/WC cabin, offering additional welfare-facility capacity for larger site teams.

name: 20ft Sanitary / Welfare Cabin
description: A 20ft CONTAINEX sanitary/welfare cabin, sized for full site welfare facilities including washrooms and rest space.

name: 24ft Sanitary / WC Cabin
description: The largest sanitary/WC cabin in the CONTAINEX range, suited to larger sites needing extensive welfare facilities in one unit.

name: 12ft x 7ft 6in Mobile Anti-Vandal Office
description: Portable Space's compact 12ft x 7ft 6in anti-vandal office, a reinforced steel site office built to resist tampering and forced entry on unsecured sites.

name: 16ft Steel Anti-Vandal Office
description: A 16ft steel anti-vandal office from Portable Space, giving extra floor space while keeping the reinforced, tamper-resistant construction of the anti-vandal range.

name: 20ft x 8ft Steel Anti-Vandal Office
description: Portable Space's 20ft x 8ft steel anti-vandal office, a full-size, reinforced site office for teams working on exposed or higher-risk sites.

name: 24ft x 9ft Steel Anti-Vandal Canteen
description: A 24ft x 9ft steel anti-vandal canteen from Portable Space, combining rest/break facilities with the range's reinforced, tamper-resistant build.

name: 32ft x 10ft Steel Anti-Vandal Office
description: Portable Space's largest anti-vandal office at 32ft x 10ft, offering maximum floor space for bigger site teams without giving up the range's reinforced security.

name: 32ft x 10ft Steel Office / Canteen Unit
description: A 32ft x 10ft combined steel office/canteen unit from Portable Space, pairing workspace and welfare facilities in one large anti-vandal-spec unit.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home — Studio
description: Grande House's 20ft expandable container home in a studio layout, folding flat for transport then unfolding on site to roughly 35 square metres of open-plan living space.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home — 1 Bedroom
description: The 1-bedroom layout of Grande House's 20ft expandable home, unfolding from a compact transport shell into a self-contained one-bedroom residence.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home — 2 Bedroom
description: Grande House's 2-bedroom expandable home layout, using the same 20ft folding shell as the studio and 1-bed models, configured for a small family or shared living.

name: 40ft Expandable Container Home
description: A larger 40ft expandable container home from Grande House, folding down for transport and expanding on site into a substantially bigger living footprint than the 20ft models.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home
description: Heshi House's 20ft expandable container home, a fold-out unit designed to ship compactly and expand into a full living space on site.

name: 40ft Expandable Granny Flat
description: A 40ft expandable granny flat from Heshi House, unfolding to roughly 11.8 by 6.24 metres of living space, suited to secondary accommodation on an existing property.

name: 40ft Expandable Container Home — 5 Bedroom
description: Heshi House's largest expandable home, a 40ft unit configured with 5 bedrooms for larger households needing a full-size expandable residence.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home (WZHKZX20)
description: WZH House's WZHKZX20 model, a 20ft expandable container home from a manufacturer specialising in fold-out residential units.

name: 40ft Expandable Luxury Container Home
description: A 40ft luxury expandable home from WZH House's series-250 range, built to a 400 kg per square metre floor load and 250 kg per square metre roof load rating.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home
description: CASA BOX's 20ft expandable container home, a fold-out residential unit designed for compact transport and on-site expansion.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home
description: UMD House's 20ft expandable container home, with a manufacturer-stated total weight of 3,500 to 4,500 kg depending on configuration.

name: 20ft Expandable Container Home
description: EFH House's 20ft expandable container home, a fold-out unit with a manufacturer-stated net weight of 3.6 tonnes.

name: 40ft Expandable Granny Flat
description: MIC-Tech's 40ft expandable granny flat, unfolding to roughly 74 square metres of living space, one of the larger expandable units in our home range.

name: Expandable Container House
description: GLAMNI's expandable container house in its 20ft configuration, folding down for shipping and expanding on site into a compact home.

name: Capsule House
description: GLAMNI's capsule house range, compact factory-built living pods offered across several size configurations.

name: 10ft Accommodation Cabin
description: A 10ft CONTAINEX cabin fitted out for accommodation use, the same CLASSIC-line shell as our office cabins, configured for living rather than working.

name: 16ft Accommodation Cabin
description: CONTAINEX's 16ft accommodation cabin, offering extra living space over the 10ft unit on the same CLASSIC-line shell.

name: 20ft Accommodation Cabin
description: A 20ft CONTAINEX accommodation cabin, a full-size CLASSIC-line shell configured for on-site living rather than office use.

name: 24ft Accommodation Cabin
description: The largest CLASSIC-line accommodation cabin from CONTAINEX, giving maximum single-unit living space in our accommodation range.

name: 20ft XL Wide-Body Accommodation Cabin
description: CONTAINEX's 20ft XL wide-body accommodation cabin, using the extra-wide XL shell to give noticeably more usable living space than the standard-width units.

name: Konstructa KM073 Middle Module (7.3m)
description: A Portakabin Konstructa KM073 middle module (7.3m), an interior module designed to connect on both sides as part of a larger modular building assembly.

name: Konstructa KM073 Left End Module (7.3m)
description: The left end-module variant of Portakabin's Konstructa KM073 range, closing off one end of a modular building run.

name: Konstructa KM073 Right End Module (7.3m)
description: The right end-module variant of Portakabin's Konstructa KM073 range, closing off one end of a modular building run.

name: Konstructa KM073 Corridor & Toilet Module (7.3m)
description: A Konstructa KM073 module combining a corridor and toilet facility, for insertion into a larger Portakabin modular building layout.

name: Konstructa KM073 Corridor & Drying Room Module (7.3m)
description: A Konstructa KM073 corridor-and-drying-room module from Portakabin, providing site drying-room facilities within a modular building assembly.

name: Konstructa KM073 Corridor & Utility Module (7.3m)
description: A Konstructa KM073 corridor-and-utility module, adding utility/plant space to a Portakabin modular building layout.

name: Konstructa KM073 Toilet, Corridor & Utility Module (7.3m)
description: A combined toilet, corridor, and utility Konstructa KM073 module from Portakabin, consolidating three functions into one modular section.

name: Konstructa KM073 Balcony Module (7.3m)
description: A Konstructa KM073 balcony module, adding external balcony access to a Portakabin modular building assembly.

name: Konstructa KM093 Middle Module (9.7m)
description: A larger Konstructa KM093 middle module (9.7m) from Portakabin, offering more floor area per module than the KM073 range.

name: Konstructa KM093 Left End Module (9.7m)
description: The left end-module variant of Portakabin's larger Konstructa KM093 (9.7m) range.

name: Konstructa KM093 Right End Module (9.7m)
description: The right end-module variant of Portakabin's larger Konstructa KM093 (9.7m) range.

name: Konstructa KM093 Corridor & Toilet Module (9.7m)
description: A Konstructa KM093 corridor-and-toilet module, providing washroom facilities within a larger 9.7m modular building assembly.

name: Konstructa KM093 Corridor & Drying Room Module (9.7m)
description: A Konstructa KM093 corridor-and-drying-room module for site drying facilities in the larger 9.7m Konstructa range.

name: Konstructa KM093 Corridor & Shower Module (9.7m)
description: A Konstructa KM093 corridor-and-shower module, adding shower welfare facilities to a Portakabin modular building layout.

name: Konstructa KM093 Mess, Toilet & Corridor Module (9.7m)
description: A combined mess, toilet, and corridor Konstructa KM093 module from Portakabin, providing break-room and washroom facilities in one section.

name: 10ft Modular Building Module
description: A 10ft CONTAINEX module for modular-building assembly, using the same CLASSIC-line shell as our office and accommodation cabins.

name: 16ft Modular Building Module
description: CONTAINEX's 16ft modular-building module, offering extra floor space over the 10ft unit for larger modular assemblies.

name: 20ft Modular Building Module
description: A 20ft CONTAINEX modular-building module, a full-size CLASSIC-line shell built for assembly into larger modular structures.

name: 20ft XL Wide-Body Modular Building Module
description: CONTAINEX's 20ft XL wide-body modular module, using the extra-wide XL shell for modular assemblies needing more floor area per section.

name: 24ft Modular Building Module
description: The largest CONTAINEX modular-building module in our range, giving maximum single-section floor space for large modular assemblies.
